title: Level Nine
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Level_Nine-Republic_50.jpg|250px|thumb|Level Nine, the First Battle of Kamino]]
'''Level Nine''' was an area of [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. During the [[First Battle of Kamino]], [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] forces overran the area.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] {{1st}}
